predictions.source_quote: For the S&P 500, we expect 10%-14% earnings growth in 2022 as trend growth returns and as the Fed begins to raise rates.
P/E multiples should contract as this occurs, delivering total returns of 7%-10% including dividends.

predictions.variable: S&P 500 ex-financials and REITs net profit margins
predictions.forecast_value: Fall by about 1% back to 2017-2019 trend levels (~11%)
predictions.source_quote: We think input cost increases will be harder to pass along in 2022, and margins may fall by 1% or so back to 2017-2019 trend levels.

predictions.variable: Brent crude oil price (JPM Commodities Research)
predictions.source_quote: JPM Research expects Brent oil prices to average $80-$90 in 2022 and 2023.

predictions.forecast_value: Grow by 3.5 million bpd to reach 99.8 mbd
predictions.source_quote: JP Morgan Commodities Research expects global oil demand to grow by 3.5 million barrels per day (mbd) in 2022 and reach 99.8 mbd, slightly above 2019 levels and a record high.
expects global oil demand to average 101.5 mbd in 2023.

predictions.forecast_value: Goods price inflation will fall as supply chains resolve
predictions.source_quote: We expect goods-related supply chain issues to be resolved, and for goods price inflation to fall as the Fed has been expecting.

predictions.forecast_value: Remain high due to chronic labor shortages
predictions.source_quote: we believe that wages and commodity prices will remain high since their supply/demand curves have shifted.
